# Neal Pyles | Funded By Pyles

> Neal Pyles is a Senior Loan Officer (NMLS #1929617) at Lone Star Financing,
> a DBA of Crestmark Lending LLC (NMLS #2789535), based in the Dallas Fort Worth
> area and licensed to lend across all of Texas. He offers conventional, FHA, VA,
> jumbo, refinance, and DSCR investment property loans through 25+ wholesale lenders.
> He also brokers business loans through Closer Capital.

## Key facts
- Name: Neal Pyles
- Role: Senior Loan Officer, NMLS #1929617
- Company: Lone Star Financing (Crestmark Lending LLC, NMLS #2789535)
- Service area: All of Texas, based in DFW (Frisco / The Colony)
- Loan types: Conventional, FHA, VA, Jumbo, Refinance, DSCR investment
- Apply: https://nealpyles.my1003app.com/1929617/register
- Book a call: https://calendly.com/npyles-lonestarfinancing/15
- Email: npyles@lonestarfinancing.com
- Business loans: https://closercap.com/neal-pyles

## Main pages
- Home: https://nealpyles.com/
- Live mortgage rates: https://nealpyles.com/#rates
- FAQ: https://nealpyles.com/#faq
